title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Look at the photograph and say what you can see.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people going on a boat trip. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: A
images.description: Four tourists are going on a boat trip on a lake. They are wearing life jackets and sitting in a small boat. There are mountains, water and another boat in the background.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows someone working on a computer. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: B
images.description: A young man is working on a computer in a quiet office. He is sitting at a desk and looking at the screen. There is a notebook, a cup and a plant on the desk.

followUp.question: Talk about the person. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.
